title: Chaozhou Stewed Fish
description: A traditional Chinese dish from the Chaozhou region, this stew is made with fresh fish and a variety of fermented ingredients.

ingredients.name: Fermented Bean Paste
ingredients.notes: Available at most Asian grocery stores

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince and sauté before adding fish

instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a wok or large pan over medium heat.
Sauté the ginger and garlic until fragrant.
Add the fermented bean paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fish and cook for 2 minutes on each side.
Pour in the soy sauce, sugar, and white pepper.
Simmer for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Garnish with scallions and serve over rice.
